protocols.fire: 1. Sound alarm immediately. 2. Evacuate guests via Staircase A (East) and Staircase B (West). 3. Assembly Point is the Main Garden (North side). 4. Do NOT use elevators. 5. Staff to use extinguishers only if fire is smaller than a wastebasket.
protocols.medical: 1. Contact on-duty doctor via Ext 104. 2. Bring First Aid Kit from Front Desk. 3. If chest pain/unconscious, call Apollo Hospital (1066) immediately via external line. 4. Clear the corridor for stretcher access.
protocols.security: 1. Lock all floor access doors. 2. Instruct guests to shelter in place and stay away from windows. 3. Security team to converge at the affected floor. 4. Contact nearest Police Station (044-2345XXXX).

extinguishers.location: Next to Staircase A on every floor
